message:
fix(cli): replace hand-rolled timestamp stubs with chrono (ft-akx00.3.1)

chrono_stub_now() used a ~45-line hand-rolled calendar approximation for
ISO 8601 formatting. format_epoch_ms() duplicated the same approach.
Both are replaced with proper chrono calls:

- chrono_stub_now() → utc_now_iso8601() using chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339_opts()
- format_epoch_ms() → chrono::DateTime::from_timestamp_millis() with millis precision

Callers (config export header, config import header) now get correct UTC
timestamps instead of approximate ones. Removes ~80 lines of hand-rolled
calendar arithmetic.

4 new tests: rfc3339 validity, millis precision, epoch zero, known date.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
